song.title: I Am in Love!
song.albumTitle: Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical)
song.description: Full lyrics to 'I Am in Love!' from Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: I Am in Love! Lyrics - Swipe Me to the Moon
og.description: Full lyrics to 'I Am in Love!' from Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

twitter.title: I Am in Love! Lyrics - Swipe Me to the Moon
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'I Am in Love!' from Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Track 10 of 22 from the groundbreaking gay dating musical.

essay: I Am in Love! is the euphoric peak of the album's romance arc. Its bright energy makes later fractures matter more by showing exactly what feels at stake.
song.lyricsHtml:
I'm in love and it's real
It's a fire in my chest I don't need to conceal
I'm in love no apologies here
No games no scripts no whispered fear

I'm in love and it's walking beside me
Holding my hand and daring the world to find me
Laughing too loud at the dumbest thing
Singing off key but I still wanna sing

I'm in love let the skyline know
Let the neighbors hear and the flowers grow
I'm in love let the world rewind
I found a heart that matched mine

He looks at me like I'm made of stars
He steals my fries and he loves my scars
We don't need plans or perfect scenes
Just shared dessert and soft routines

I'm in love and it feels like gold
Like a secret I get to finally hold
Like I've waited forever for this sound
My own name said with love out loud

I'm in love and I won't sit still
Gonna dance on rooftops shout from hills
I'm in love and it's loud and gay
And it's mine and it's real and it's here to stay

I'm in love not someday not pretend
I'm in love and it's only the beginning
